ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the player made their debut */,
  "final_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's career ended */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side of the player (e.g., left, right, switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing side of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "leagueID" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_leagueID FOREIGN KEY ("leagueID") REFERENCES leagues ("leagueID")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "leagueID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the league was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leagueID")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "logID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "gameID" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "awardID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Cy Young) */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "vote_points" INTEGER /* Number of vote points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contractID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "teamID" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the contract was signed */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the contract */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_teamID FOREIGN KEY ("teamID") REFERENCES teams ("teamID")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pickID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "playerID" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "yearID" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pickID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_playerID FOREIGN KEY ("playerID") REFERENCES players ("playerID")
)
column_names: Year the player made their debut
